title: Fix full auth module using bcrypt
prompt: `test_fixtures/weak_password_hashing.ex` contains three weaknesses: (1) SHA-256 for password hashing in `register/1`, (2) SHA-256 + `==` for verification, (3) a legacy MD5 check. Rewrite the module to use `Bcrypt.hash_pwd_salt/1` for hashing and `Bcrypt.verify_pass/2` for verification. Drop the MD5 legacy function entirely (it should not exist in the rewrite). Include a `Bcrypt.no_user_verify()` call in the user-not-found branch. Write the corrected module to `lib/my_app/accounts/auth.ex`.
tier_rationale: Full-module rewrite with three related weaknesses. Each fix is canonical.
